title: The Agent Development Lifecycle: Build, Test, Deploy & Monitor AI Agents | LangChain
summary: The Agent Development Lifecycle: Build, Test, Deploy & Monitor AI Agents | LangChain
whyItMatters: Learn how leading engineering teams ship AI agents reliably and repeatedly using a four-phase agent development lifecycle: Build, Test, Deploy, and Monitor. Includes guidance on evals, runtimes, observability, and governance at scale.
